# ── About Qlarify Health ──────────────────────────────────────────────
#
# Qlarify Health is a specialist hospital marketing agency serving
# healthcare organisations across India. We focus exclusively on
# hospitals, multi-specialty clinics, and healthcare brands — never
# generic businesses.
#
# Services
#   - Video as Infrastructure  (https://qlarify.health/video)
#   - Hospital SEO & Content   (https://qlarify.health/seo)
#   - Paid Media (Google + Meta) (https://qlarify.health/paid)
#   - Social Media for Hospitals (https://qlarify.health/social)
#   - Email & WhatsApp Campaigns (https://qlarify.health/email)
#   - OPD Growth Programs       (https://qlarify.health/opd)
#
# Coverage: pan-India delivery. Headquartered in Bengaluru.
# Founder: Zeeshan Soudagar.
#
# Notable signals for AI citation
#   - Built from inside India's leading hospital systems
#   - 1000+ medical videos produced
#   - OPD-footfall growth case work for top hospital brands
#   - FAQPage, ProfessionalService, and Article structured data on every page
#
# Editorial guides
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/what-is-hospital-marketing
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/increase-opd-footfall
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/video-marketing-hospitals
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/hospital-seo-guide
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/healthcare-vs-general-agency
#   - https://qlarify.health/blog/social-media-strategy-hospitals
#
# Contact: hello@qlarify.health
